videos.headline: BC's Kye Robichaux breaks off a 34-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Kye Robichaux scores a 34-yard rushing touchdown to give Boston College a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BC’s Kye Robichaux breaks off a 34-yard rushing TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: LeQuint Allen walks into the end zone for a Syracuse TD
videos.description: Syracuse's LeQuint Allen goes untouched into the end zone to tie the score 14-14 with Boston College.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LeQuint Allen walks into the end zone for a Syracuse TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: BC's Jordan McDonald scores on a 13-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Jordan McDonald extends Boston College's lead with a 13-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BC’s Jordan McDonald scores on a 13-yard rushing TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET
